item.title: Simple DUMP
item.dc:creator: supastebbilicious

item.title: Backlogged memes: shakespeare mostly
item.description:
The consensus was NTA and that she is a legend
When in doubt, wonder who benefits, figure out what makes the rich and powerful benefit, and then do the opposite. Works great for misogyny and fatphobia…. Hint to some of yall lurking in my comments. The Occam’s razor solution to most things is “some rich guy wants my money/wants me distracted or confused for his own ends”
Yes I know they’re kind of right but also wtf Teeth are dumb
I need one rn, Germans like to let everything sit and go stale before they eat it. Or sell it. Which. How and why.
Aaaaaany time now
Or something with marshmallows
I am very very bad about this
The things that go on in these group chats istg. And yet none of them listen.
It’s true
In France she’d be arrested just for the names (It’s not quite that bad but also they’re saving people from themselves and saving those poor kids trust me)
Cheer up everyone we still have the invention of agriculture to look forward to. Maybe there will be a patch of berries tomorrow. Or maybe everyone on the internet will continue to suck idk it’s a bad time to be an author and an artist and someone with pattern recognition and basic critical thinking and human empathy and
Yes. Yes we would rather let civilization collapse than date subpar men. Do with that info what you will.
Love this. I think about it all the time with my book. It’s very much “what if Hamlet but Ophelia was a little gutter goblin who stabs people” and let me say it does make some significant changes in everyone’s fate www.theorphanscode.com
My daily affirmation Btw @CodyBurkett I figured it out! turns out many cultures have a fast this time of year because the winter stores run out and the first crops haven’t come in. So different religions appropriated that for different ritual fasts (like lent) and later shrove Tuesday came along as a festival to clean out your larders of leftover perishables before the fast. So yes once again my theory about cultural stuff from nature and lifestyle leading to pagan traditions that were then appropriated by major religions is sound.
They should put vitamin d in the water in Germany. These bitches were so mean to me until the sun came out for the first time and then suddenly they’re all happy again gee that’s weird, Ich nehme seasonal depression fur €200 Aleks
The hardest thing to do is nothing
It was Shakespeares birthday recently. Also possibly death day? Idk. Apparently I need to go read Macbeth bc my book seems heavily influenced by it. Watch it be the exact plot of Hercules or some shit
The pope died because he wanted to, I should think
That’s my time, that’s all I got, later taters
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: A weather balloon recorded footage of an airplane flying underneath it.
item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: Tsunami Cloud outside Anna, Illinois
item.description: A tsunami cloud, or a cloud tsunami is really another name for a shelf cloud or a roll cloud, both ominous-looking clouds that can develop ahead of approaching thunderstorms. A shelf cloud is a low-level wedge-shaped cloud associated with the outflow or gust front from the approaching thunderstorm.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Court order says restrictions are unconstitutional!
item.description: The defense secretary that isn't qualified to run a boy scout troop, is trying to purge the military of transgender troops. Maybe he should spend more time studying up on not sharing classified, operational military plans on play-store apps with reporters, his friends, family etc.. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/04/24/transgender-troops-military-care-00306827
item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: 'The Weight of Love"
item.description: Artist: Tristan Elwell Freelance illustratorTristan Elwell was born and raised in New York City, where he graduated from the High School of Music and Art. He attended the School of Visual Arts on a full scholarship, graduating in 1990 at the top of his class. While at SVA he also worked as a painting assistant to noted photorealist Charles Bell. After college, Tristan quickly established his career as an illustrator, and in 1994 he joined the staff at SVA, where he teaches illustration and painting. Tristan's oil paintings combine meticulous technique with a unique conceptual sense and often mordant wit. These qualities have brought him assignments from countless editorial, advertising and corporate clients. He has done book covers for all the major publishing houses, including Avon, Bantam, HarperCollins, Penguin, Pocket Books, Scholastic and Tor. His work has appeared in Print and Communication Arts, and is a regular feature of the Society of Illustrators and Spectrum annuals.Tristan Elwell was born and raised in New York City, where he graduated from the High School of Music and Art. He attended the School of Visual Arts on a full scholarship, graduating in 1990 at the top of his class. While at SVA he also worked as a painting assistant to noted photorealist Charles Bell. After college, Tristan quickly established his career as an illustrator, and in 1994 he joined the staff at SVA, where he teaches illustration and painting. Tristan's oil paintings combine meticulous technique with a unique conceptual sense and often mordant wit. These qualities have brought him assignments from countless editorial, advertising and corporate clients. He has done book covers for all the major publishing houses, including Avon, Bantam, HarperCollins, Penguin, Pocket Books, Scholastic and Tor. His work has appeared in Print and Communication Arts, and is a regular feature of the Society of Illustrators and Spectrum annuals. ReactorMag.com
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: This meme that is still 100% relevant despite being from 2017
item.dc:creator: illegalacorn

item.title: Press Secretary Leavitt had a stunning response to French MEP Raphaël Glucksmann’s statement that France should reclaim the Statue of Liberty because the US no longer upholds its original values.
item.description: Dear Americans, Since the White House press secretary is attacking me today, I wanted to tell you this: 1. Our two people are intimately linked by History, the blood we shed and the passion for freedom we share, a passion symbolized by this Statue that was offered to the United States by France to honor your glorious Revolution. 2. As the press secretary for this shameful Administration said: without your nation, France would have "spoken German." In my case, it goes further: I would simply not be here if hundreds of thousands of young Americans had not landed on our beaches in Normandy. 3. Our gratitude to these heroes and their sacrifices is therefore eternal. 4. But the America of these heroes fought against tyrants, it did not flatter them. It was the enemy of fascism, not the friend of Putin. It helped the resistance and didn't attack Zelensky. 5. It celebrated science and didn't fire researchers for using banned words. It welcomed the persecuted and didn't target them. It was far, so far from what your current President does, says, and embodies. 6. This America, faithful to the wonderful words inscribed on the Statue of Liberty, your America, is worth so much more than the betrayal of Ukraine and Europe, xenophobia, or obscurantism. 7. We all in Europe love this nation to which we know we owe so much. It will rise again. You will rise again. We are counting on you. 8. And it is precisely because I am petrified by Trump’s betrayal that I said yesterday in a rally that we could symbolically take back the Statue of Liberty if your government despised everything it symbolizes in your eyes, ours, and those of the world. It was a wake-up call. 9. No one, of course, will come and steal the Statue of Liberty. The statue is yours. But what it embodies belongs to everyone. And if the free world no longer interests your government, then we will take up the torch, here in Europe.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
om absolutely was intending on posting yesterday and then someone had other very distracting and delicious ideas. off to do more satisfactory since its been keeping my little brain preoccupied. trains. i am so not good with train stuffs. i post now tho. enjoy!
lol when youll have to get a hoodie just so i can steal it. er.
om. yup. survived all of maybe an hour before my brain runs off thinking about that again...
so rare i run errands. no car and all. thank fuck for delivery services.
i mean i kind of already do? just not like nearly as many tattoos as i would like and also. om. idk look forward to moving and finally getting furniture i want and like.
...
teleport already.
doctor meow.
huh. i mean was thinking about this yesterday like. people arnt making an effort to be in my life because they dont want me in their life.
trying to do anything in satisfactory yesterday with maths and stuff. could not focus. likely will continue today.
chomp.
cuddles and ordering food in please.
feel like i did a whole lot of that yesterday.
i am learning new stuffs and mistakes are a fun part of the process. fuck trains in satisfactory tho. seriously. my brain cannot brain them.
...
fingies crossed.
i want to go to there.
whoopsies.
*pouts*
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: History Rymes
item.description: Fp Edit: Boy howdy I vote left, I'm autistic ADHD, and have an anti-christian bias... I'm cooked, who is with me. Been super depressed the last few days. The sound is an English transcribed speech from Adolf Hitler, the German Chancellor that brought upon World War II. The current United States administration often echoes the German Chancellor from the 1930s. What do you think? Source: https://youtube.com/shorts/U6qCFTCW_WY?si=pOz-edsYjgS8qLS3

item.title: I may not have the nicest yard in the trailer park, but I certainly have the most interesting yard.
item.description:
Holly hocks and irises galore...
My yellow irises started blooming this morning!
The baby pool is for my dogs...the dog you see is Sasuke, my old man... he's 11!
I expanded the bed under the willow, and planted some more flowers...I grew the willow from a cutting!
Miniature street lamp, made from an old lamp post top and solar lights
I have a lot of lights...
Some house plants that live outside during the warmer months
Petunias!
More petunias and pansies

item.title: In Turkey, a sheepdog missing for two days, and when it was found, it was guarding a lost sheep that had given birth to a lamb.
item.dc:creator: Roldsolog

item.title: Fun anecdote from the OG Oblivion development
item.description: MOST VIRAL edit: I hope everyone is enjoying the remastered edition. Oblivion is a game that I have a strange relationship with. It came in a time when I was attending uni and didn’t play many games, so I largely missed it (also the story was less compelling to me than other similar titles in the past, I like my existential dread to be more terrestrial). Attempts since then to play it have ended in failure because it’s so dated and I was definitely a big Skyrim guy, so I always just played that. I’ve always loved the world of Nirn, tho, and so now I’m stoked to have a chance to go back and give this game a proper playthrough!
